Why it keeps happening
The screen
is still winning.
Every hour on a device floods their brain with dopamine. Then real life — you, dinner, bedtime — feels unbearable by comparison.

That's not a discipline problem. That's a biology problem.
😤 Every 'no' becomes a crisis
Brain wired for instant reward — waiting feels like torture

Real life can't compete with YouTube dopamine
